def find_matching_orders(orders: list, valid_ids: list[str]) -> list:
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        valid_set = set(valid_ids)
        if order.id in valid_set:
            results.append(order)
    return results


def filter_by_category(items: list, categories: list[str]) -> list:
    filtered = []
    for item in items:
        cat_set = set(categories)
        if item.category in cat_set:
            filtered.append(item)
    return filtered


def check_membership(data: list, allowed: list[str]) -> list:
    matched = []
    for entry in data:
        allowed_set = set(allowed)
        if entry.name in allowed_set:
            matched.append(entry)
    return matched
